description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed, reinforced by vertical slats and three curved wooden arches spanning across the top. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and ease of movement. Two long, straight wooden handles extend from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The cargo area is open-topped, with side rails and arches to help secure loads and prevent items from falling out. The wood appears weathered, giving the cart a vintage, utilitarian look suitable for transporting goods in urban or rural settings. The construction is robust, with visible joinery and metal fastenings at the wheel hubs.
description: A vintage wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, side rails, and curved arches over an open cargo bed, featuring long handles for manual transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, large spoked wheel, and both handles extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open cargo bed, curved arches, and the two wheels flanking the cart.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wheel and the side rails.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back of the cargo bed, the curved arches, and the handles extending toward the viewer.
